headline: Olive Garden Follows McDonald’s Bet on Value: Will Never Ending Pasta Pass Strategy Work?
summary: With inflation and higher costs at the grocery store and restaurants, Olive Garden is turning to affordability as a major hook to win over consumers, with never-ending and all-you-can-eat playing into its annual pasta promotion. This year’s promotion gets a...
